{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Kitone-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Ancient times|ja|上古}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 別名 =
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 =
| 官位 =
| 主君 =
| 氏族 = Ki clan ({{ill|Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造}})
| 父母 = Father: {{ill|Hikoma-no-Mikoto|ja|比古麻命}}<ref name="名前なし-20230316135012">Suzuki Masanobu, "The Establishment of the Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko Shidai and Its Background" [https://123deta.com/document/ydvxje1y-紀伊国造次第の成立とその背景.html ]</ref>
| 兄弟 =
| 子   = {{ill|Kushitama-no-Mikoto|ja|久志多麻命}}<ref name="名前なし-20230316135012"/>
| 特記事項 =
}}
'''Kitone-no-Mikoto''' (''kitone-no-mikoto''; dates of birth and death unknown) was a {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} of ancient {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}} and one of the '''{{ill|Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造}}'''.

== Genealogy ==
A grandson of {{ill|Amenomichine-no-Mikoto|ja|天道根命}}, his father is given as {{ill|Hikoma-no-Mikoto|ja|比古麻命}} according to the "Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko Shidai" owned by Ki Toshiyuki, a descendant of the {{ill|Ki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀国造}}.<ref name="名前なし-20230316135012"/>

== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|Kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}

{{デフォルトソート:きとねのみこと}}
[[Category:Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:紀伊国の人物]]
[[Category:和歌山県の歴史]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:鬼刀禰命]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
